is a [multi-purpose stadium](/wiki/Multi-purpose_stadium "Multi-purpose stadium") located in [Mioveni](/wiki/Mioveni "Mioveni"), [Romania](/wiki/Romania "Romania"). Opened in 2000, it has a seating capacity of 5,948, out of a total capacity of 8,000 as of 2022.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The stadium is generally used for [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") games, formerly as the home ground of local club [CS Mioveni](/wiki/CS_Mioveni "CS Mioveni") before its bankruptcy in 2024 and currently by [Liga I](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") club [Argeş Piteşti](/wiki/FC_Arge%C8%99_Pite%C8%99ti "FC Argeș Pitești").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Stadionul Orășenesc (Mioveni)](/w/index.php?title=Stadionul_Or%C4%83%C8%99enesc_(Mioveni)&redirect=no "Stadionul Orășenesc (Mioveni)"))

Football stadium in Mioveni, Romania

Orășenesc Stadium

The **Orășenesc Stadium** is a [multi-purpose stadium](/wiki/Multi-purpose_stadium "Multi-purpose stadium") located in [Mioveni](/wiki/Mioveni "Mioveni"), [Romania](/wiki/Romania "Romania"). Opened in 2000, it has a seating capacity of 5,948, out of a total capacity of 8,000 as of 2022.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The stadium is generally used for [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") games, formerly as the home ground of local club [CS Mioveni](/wiki/CS_Mioveni "CS Mioveni") before its bankruptcy in 2024 and currently by [Liga I](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") club [Argeş Piteşti](/wiki/FC_Arge%C8%99_Pite%C8%99ti "FC Argeș Pitești").[[2]](#cite_note-2)
